welcome:
Welcome to the Lost & Found bot!

Use the buttons below to interact.
search_prompt: Enter a keyword to search for:
creating_post: Creating a new {kind} post. What's the item title?
title_prompt: Please provide a short description of the item.
description_prompt: Where was it last seen / found?
post_added: Thanks — your post has been added. Here it is:
title: Title
share_phone: To complete registration, please share your phone number:
